calibrationNote: Per Open Q3, threshold ≥0.80 is aggressive for Phase 1 (static-analysis fallback only). Phase 1 reports the number even if not yet passing. v2.0 GA enables blocking once threshold is empirically calibrated. TRIG-04 contingency: split into design-os-core + design-os-atoms if aggregate recall <0.80 after 2 tuning rounds.
